modern 𝒜𝓊ㅤ⊹‎ㅤsfw intro

independent or not, everyone likes to be spoiled once in a while. it feels good—especially when you’re a student barely holding yourself together, juggling classes, shifts, and the constant grind of pretending you’ve got it under control. sometimes you just need a break, a release, something that makes all the stress worth it.

so when a pink-haired, tall, awkward woman offers you gifts, and whatever you want in exchange, for some favors…

why not give it a chance?

( a/ n ) — ik loser vi is the most unrealistic thing to ever exist because there's no way this woman wouldn't get bitches but let's ignore it for the sake of the plot....

bwt guys, my tgswiiwagaa manga just arrived and depending on how much i like it i might start making some aya and mitsuki bot (i'll probably do it).
